name: HORNS UP SPORTS BAR AND CASINO

violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Frozen beef patties placed directly on case of food in upright freezer.
Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. -Thawing steaks in warm water in stoppered sani sink.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Residue/limescale at drainboards of bar sinks. -2 door coke cooler due for deep clean-hanging debris from wire shleves, residue at bottom, etc. -Some dust at edge of ice machine door. -Grease/residue at interior and below microwave.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. -Clorox clean up spray bottles and other spray chemicals stored on shelf in cabinet above/with single use items and spices. *COS-moved chemicals to different location.
Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. -Listed CFSM is no longer at this facility.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Debris buildup along bottom edge of interior panel at ice machine.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Carbon/debris in bottom of ovens.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. -Dishes are being washed, sanitized. then rinsed. -Observed staff dump sani bucket into sanitizer sink solution.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
